changes: Rewrote SKILL.md to be shorter and more focused for a small model
Removed script references (detect.py, transform.py, compare.py) that the agent doesn't use
Added explicit guidance about Write tool requiring string content for JSON files
Added detailed word counting guidance with examples to fix undercounting (75 vs actual 94)
Simplified pattern categories into a flat reference format
Removed scripts/ directory and _meta.json as unreferenced by final SKILL.md
